meta.intent: Teach vine as a visible route blocker before it adds pressure by making the shortest rescue lane run directly through a static vine column.
meta.expectedPath: Take the central vine lane because it is clearly the shortest path to the puppy, then use the side pairs only as support once the route is open.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player treats vine like background clutter, detours around it with slower side clears, and gives up too much water time on a board that should read direct.
meta.whatItProves: Vine can enter as pressure visualization, not confusion.
meta.notes: Growth is effectively disabled here so the player only learns the vine tile as a one-hit route tax before L08 adds the preview-and-growth pressure.
